CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Robert Cohen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Milk Milk Lemonade, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Yourshpere Media, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on August 16, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed August 16, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 16, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Milk Milk Lemonade, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Yoursphere Media, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,288.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $414.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $36,702.30.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
